rationale: CR-003 and CR-004 both resolved. Fix-up diff correctly imports DropdownChangeEvent from primereact/dropdown, updates handler parameter type from { value: unknown } to DropdownChangeEvent (matching Select onChange contract), and adds null/undefined safety check before accessing event.value. Both CodeBlockFontSection and FontSection fixed consistently. All CR-002 acceptance criteria remain satisfied.

business_review.criterion: Type guard uses TypeScript is keyword

standards_review.notes: Handler parameter type now correctly matches Select onChange contract (DropdownChangeEvent). Full IDE autocomplete and type checking benefits restored.
Defensive check added: if (!event || event.value === undefined) return. Prevents runtime crash if onChange called with null/undefined.
